test-case.description: should THROW if AI Engine script is not found
test-case.name: Get-PredictiveInsights AI Function.should THROW if AI Engine script is not found

test-case.description: should THROW if Python executable is not found
test-case.name: Get-PredictiveInsights AI Function.should THROW if Python executable is not found

test-case.description: should successfully execute and parse valid JSON output from Python script

test-case.description: should THROW if Python script returns non-zero exit code and provides stderr

test-case.description: should return structured error if Python script returns non-zero exit code and stderr is JSON
test-case.name: Get-PredictiveInsights AI Function.should return structured error if Python script returns non-zero exit code and stderr is JSON

test-case.description: should THROW if Python script returns zero exit code but empty stdout

test-case.description: should THROW if Python script returns zero exit code but invalid JSON in stdout

test-case.description: should pass different AnalysisType parameters correctly to Python script

test-case.description: should use specified PythonExecutable and ScriptPath if provided
test-case.name: Get-PredictiveInsights AI Function.should use specified PythonExecutable and ScriptPath if provided

test-case.description: Should match if all keywords are present in Message (case-insensitive) and MinOccurrences met

test-case.description: Should NOT match if not all keywords are present in Message

test-case.description: Should use the correct config file path from script's relative location

test-case.name: Update-CertificateStore.ps1 Tests.Parameter Handling (Update-CertificateStore).Should override AllowedSignatureAlgorithms with parameter

test-case.name: Update-CertificateStore.ps1 Tests.Parameter Handling (Update-CertificateStore).Should not update root certificates if -UpdateRootCertificates $false

test-case.name: Update-CertificateStore.ps1 Tests.Parameter Handling (Update-CertificateStore).Should not validate existing certificates if -ValidateChain $false

test-case.description: SKIPPED: Should log an error and throw if not run as Administrator (non-admin scenario is hard to simulate reliably under current Pester setup)
test-case.name: Set-FirewallRules.ps1 Tests.Administrator Check (Set-FirewallRules).SKIPPED: Should log an error and throw if not run as Administrator (non-admin scenario is hard to simulate reliably under current Pester setup)

test-case.description: Should run with default parameters (EnforceRules=$true, BackupRules=$true)
test-case.name: Set-FirewallRules.ps1 Tests.Parameter Handling (Set-FirewallRules).Should run with default parameters (EnforceRules=$true, BackupRules=$true)

test-case.description: Should NOT enforce rules if -EnforceRules $false
test-case.name: Set-FirewallRules.ps1 Tests.Parameter Handling (Set-FirewallRules).Should NOT enforce rules if -EnforceRules $false

test-case.description: Should NOT attempt backup if -BackupRules $false (but still enforce)
test-case.name: Set-FirewallRules.ps1 Tests.Parameter Handling (Set-FirewallRules).Should NOT attempt backup if -BackupRules $false (but still enforce)

test-case.description: Should CREATE a new OUTBOUND rule "Allow Azure Arc Management" if it does not exist
test-case.name: Set-FirewallRules.ps1 Tests.Firewall Rule Processing (Set-FirewallRules).Should CREATE a new OUTBOUND rule "Allow Azure Arc Management" if it does not exist

test-case.description: Should CREATE a new OUTBOUND rule "Block Old App" with Action Block
test-case.name: Set-FirewallRules.ps1 Tests.Firewall Rule Processing (Set-FirewallRules).Should CREATE a new OUTBOUND rule "Block Old App" with Action Block

test-case.description: Should CREATE a new INBOUND rule "Allow WinRM" and set Enabled based on "required=false"
test-case.name: Set-FirewallRules.ps1 Tests.Firewall Rule Processing (Set-FirewallRules).Should CREATE a new INBOUND rule "Allow WinRM" and set Enabled based on "required=false"

test-case.description: Should UPDATE an existing rule if Get-NetFirewallRule returns a different rule
test-case.name: Set-FirewallRules.ps1 Tests.Firewall Rule Processing (Set-FirewallRules).Should UPDATE an existing rule if Get-NetFirewallRule returns a different rule

test-case.description: Should use specified Profile if provided in JSON for a new rule
test-case.name: Set-FirewallRules.ps1 Tests.Firewall Rule Processing (Set-FirewallRules).Should use specified Profile if provided in JSON for a new rule

test-case.description: Should call "netsh advfirewall export" when BackupRules is $true (default) and EnforceRules is $true (default)
test-case.name: Set-FirewallRules.ps1 Tests.Backup Logic (Set-FirewallRules).Should call "netsh advfirewall export" when BackupRules is $true (default) and EnforceRules is $true (default)

test-case.description: Should NOT call "netsh advfirewall export" when BackupRules is $false
test-case.name: Set-FirewallRules.ps1 Tests.Backup Logic (Set-FirewallRules).Should NOT call "netsh advfirewall export" when BackupRules is $false

test-case.description: Should NOT call "netsh advfirewall export" when EnforceRules is $false
test-case.name: Set-FirewallRules.ps1 Tests.Backup Logic (Set-FirewallRules).Should NOT call "netsh advfirewall export" when EnforceRules is $false

test-case.description: Should log key actions
test-case.name: Set-FirewallRules.ps1 Tests.Logging Output (Set-FirewallRules).Should log key actions

test-case.description: SKIPPED: Should log an error and throw if not run as Administrator (non-admin scenario is hard to simulate reliably under current Pester setup)
test-case.name: Set-AuditPolicies.ps1 Tests.Administrator Check (Set-AuditPolicies).SKIPPED: Should log an error and throw if not run as Administrator (non-admin scenario is hard to simulate reliably under current Pester setup)

test-case.description: Should run with default parameters (EnforceSettings=$true, BackupSettings=$true)
test-case.name: Set-AuditPolicies.ps1 Tests.Parameter Handling (Set-AuditPolicies).Should run with default parameters (EnforceSettings=$true, BackupSettings=$true)

test-case.description: Should NOT enforce settings if -EnforceSettings $false
test-case.name: Set-AuditPolicies.ps1 Tests.Parameter Handling (Set-AuditPolicies).Should NOT enforce settings if -EnforceSettings $false

test-case.description: Should NOT attempt backup if -BackupSettings $false (but still enforce)
test-case.name: Set-AuditPolicies.ps1 Tests.Parameter Handling (Set-AuditPolicies).Should NOT attempt backup if -BackupSettings $false (but still enforce)

test-case.description: Should set "Credential Validation" to Success and Failure
test-case.name: Set-AuditPolicies.ps1 Tests.Audit Policy Processing (Set-AuditPolicies).Should set "Credential Validation" to Success and Failure

test-case.description: Should set "Process Creation" to Success only
test-case.name: Set-AuditPolicies.ps1 Tests.Audit Policy Processing (Set-AuditPolicies).Should set "Process Creation" to Success only

test-case.description: Should set "Logon" to Failure only
test-case.name: Set-AuditPolicies.ps1 Tests.Audit Policy Processing (Set-AuditPolicies).Should set "Logon" to Failure only

test-case.description: Should set "File System" to No Auditing (both disabled)
test-case.name: Set-AuditPolicies.ps1 Tests.Audit Policy Processing (Set-AuditPolicies).Should set "File System" to No Auditing (both disabled)

test-case.description: Should call "auditpol /backup /file:" when BackupSettings and EnforceSettings are $true (default)
test-case.name: Set-AuditPolicies.ps1 Tests.Backup Logic (Set-AuditPolicies).Should call "auditpol /backup /file:" when BackupSettings and EnforceSettings are $true (default)

test-case.description: Should NOT call "auditpol /backup" when BackupSettings is $false
test-case.name: Set-AuditPolicies.ps1 Tests.Backup Logic (Set-AuditPolicies).Should NOT call "auditpol /backup" when BackupSettings is $false

test-case.description: Should NOT call "auditpol /backup" when EnforceSettings is $false (but BackupSettings is true - script logic)
test-case.name: Set-AuditPolicies.ps1 Tests.Backup Logic (Set-AuditPolicies).Should NOT call "auditpol /backup" when EnforceSettings is $false (but BackupSettings is true - script logic)

test-case.description: Should log key actions
test-case.name: Set-AuditPolicies.ps1 Tests.Logging Output (Set-AuditPolicies).Should log key actions

test-case.description: Should detect drift if a registry key value is non-compliant
test-case.name: Test-ConfigurationDrift.ps1 Tests.Registry Drift Detection.Should detect drift if a registry key value is non-compliant

test-case.description: Should return DriftDetected=$false when all checks are compliant

test-case.description: Should return OverallStatus=Success if all default providers are registered

test-case.description: Should use discovered SubscriptionId from registry if not provided

test-case.description: Should return Failed result if Az.Resources module is not available

test-case.description: Should return Failed result if no Azure context is active
test-case.name: Test-ResourceProviderStatus.ps1 Tests.Should return Failed result if no Azure context is active

test-case.description: Should return Failed result if SubscriptionId is not provided and cannot be discovered from registry

test-case.description: Should check custom list of providers if -RequiredResourceProviders is specified

test-case.description: Should return OverallStatus=Failed if Get-AzResourceProvider throws for a provider
